headline: Shareholder Proposals Test Governance And Pay Priorities At Dominion Energy
summary: Shareholders of Dominion Energy (NYSE:D) have submitted a series of proposals ahead of the company’s 2026 annual meeting. The proposals call for an independent board chair, new shareholder engagement channels, and a report on the impact of ESG and DEI metrics in executive pay. These items highlight investor focus on board structure, transparency, and how management incentives are designed. Dominion Energy operates as a regulated utility, supplying electricity and natural gas to customers...

headline: Has Dominion Energy (D) Cooled Enough After Portfolio Simplification For Fresh Upside?
summary: If you are wondering whether Dominion Energy's share price still offers value or if the easy gains are already behind it, this article explains what the current valuation signals for you as a shareholder or potential investor. With the stock at US$62.20 after a 6.5% decline over the past month, alongside a 5.0% gain year to date and an 18.5% return over the last year, the recent track record raises questions about how much is already priced in and how much risk the market currently...
